top_signals.title: U.S. confirms second Texas screwworm case, Canada restricts livestock imports
top_signals.summary: New World screwworm larvae feed on the living tissue of warm-blooded animals, creating severe wounds that can be fatal if left untreated.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Truckload’s shrinking miles
top_signals.summary:
Supply chain adaptations have led to diminishing distances for truckloads. The shrinking length of haul has mitigated some of the recent market capacity shortfalls.

The post Truckload’s shrinking miles appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Road tripping in Bhutan: Big fun in a tiny kingdom
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: World’s Hottest Market Korea Has Bulls Reaching for Protection
top_signals.summary: A wave of optimism over South Korean stocks is giving way to growing caution, as some investors hedge positions and pare back crowded trades on concerns that the rally has run too hot, too fast.

top_signals.title: Speech by Commissioner Šefčovič at the Brussels Economic Security Forum
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 05 Jun 2026 Ladies and gentlemen,
It is a pleasure to return to the Brussels Economic Security Forum, so let me thank the European Policy Centre for the invitation.
